data.title: Algoma Central GAAP EPS of $2.29, revenue of $0.7M
data.description:
• Algoma Central press release (TSX:ALC:CA): FY GAAP EPS of $2.29.
  • Revenue of $0.7M (-2.8% Y/Y).

data.title: Ollie's accelerates pace of store openings as it takes advantage of the Big Lots bankruptcy
data.description:
Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings (NASDAQ:OLLI) announced the acquisition of 40 former Big Lots store leases from Gordon Brothers. The acquisition of the additional store leases is subject to final bankruptcy court approval and customary closing conditions.

The retailer has been active in picking through the scraps of the Big Lots bankruptcy, and has now acquired a total of 63 former Big Lots store leases to date.

"Everything about these stores lines up well with our business and growth strategy. These locations are the right size, come with favorable lease terms, are located in existing and adjacent trade areas, and have long serviced value conscious consumers," highlighted Ollie's (NASDAQ:OLLI) CEO Eric van der Valk.

Ollie's (OLLI) plans to adjust its existing new store openings and prioritize the opening of the acquired stores in a manner that makes the most operational and financial sense. The acquisition of the Big Lots store leases are expected to provide the company with the opportunity to accelerate new store openings in 2025 above the stated 10% annual growth target and open approximately 75 units.

Ollie's (OLLI) currently operates 568 stores in 31 states.

Share of Ollie's (OLLI) were up 1.6% in premarket trading.

data.title: Olin to pursue private offering of senior notes
data.description:
• Olin (NYSE:OLN) on Friday said it intends to offer $600 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2033.
  • The Senior Notes will be Olin's senior unsecured obligations and will not be guaranteed by any subsidiaries of Olin on the issue date.
  • Olin intends to use the net proceeds, together with borrowings under new replacement credit facilities that Olin intends to enter into concurrently with or shortly after the consummation of the offering to redeem all of its $500 million of 5.125% Senior Notes due 2027, refinance its existing revolving credit facility and repay all borrowings.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Guardian Capital Group GAAP EPS of C$4.10, revenue of C$323.4M
data.description:
• Guardian Capital Group press release (TSX:GCG:CA): FY GAAP EPS of C$4.10.
  • Revenue of C$323.4M (+34.1% Y/Y).
  • EBITDA was C$70.9 million in 2024, compared to C$85.4 million in the prior year.

  • Adjusted cash flow from operations in 2024 was C$57.5 million, compared to C$72.8 million in 2023.

  • During 2024, the company returned to shareholders C$35.6 million in dividends and C$24.9 million in share buybacks.

data.title: Taiga Building Products GAAP EPS of C$0.06, revenue of C$389.04M
data.description:
• Taiga Building Products press release (TSX:TBL:CA): Q4 GAAP EPS of C$0.06.
  • Revenue of C$389.04M (+5.8% Y/Y).
  • EBITDA for the quarter ended December 31, 2024 was C$15.7 million compared to C$13.1 million for the same period last year.

data.title: Localiza Rent a Car S.A. reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Localiza Rent a Car S.A. press release (OTCQX:LZRFY): Q4 consolidated net revenue of R$9.9B (+24.6% Y/Y).
  • EBITDA reached R$3.3B, while net income totaled R$837M.

data.title: Traws Pharma regains Nasdaq compliance
data.description:
• Traws Pharma (NASDAQ:TRAW) said on Friday it has received Nasdaq confirmation that the company has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum stockholders’ equity requirements of $2.5 million for continued listing.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Bowman awarded $6M multi-year contract by City of Montebello
data.description:
• Bowman Consulting Group (NASDAQ:BWMN) on Friday said it has been awarded a $6 million on-call design and engineering services contract with the City of Montebello, California.
  • The three-year agreement will generate $2 million annually and includes two optional one-year extensions, creating the potential for a five-year partnership worth up to $10 million, the company said.
  • Under the contract, Bowman will provide design and engineering services to support Montebello’s infrastructure and community development initiatives.
  • BWMN -1.12% premarket to $19.8.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Arcos Dorados intends to redeem outstanding 5.875% senior notes due 2027
data.description:
• Arcos Dorados (NYSE:ARCO) said it intends to redeem all its outstanding 5.875% senior notes due 2027.
  • Under the terms, the notes will be redeemed at a redemption price equal to 100% of the outstanding principal amount of the notes plus accrued and unpaid interest from October 4, 2024, to, but excluding the redemption date.
  • The anticipated redemption date is April 4.

data.title: Alpha Metallurgical misses Q3 top-line estimates; updates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Alpha Metallurgical press release (NYSE:AMR): Q4 GAAP EPS of -$0.16 in-line.
  • Revenue of $617.35M (-35.7% Y/Y) misses by $40.85M.
  • Posts Adjusted EBITDA of $53.2 million for the quarter.
  • Reduced letters of credit outstanding by $15 million during the quarter.

  • 2025 Guidance Adjustments and Performance Update

    Alpha is reducing its full-year 2025 guidance for metallurgical coal shipment volumes. The new metallurgical coal shipments guidance range is 14.5 million tons to 15.5 million tons, down from the prior range of 15.0 million tons to 16.0 million tons. Additionally, the company is increasing its 2025 cost of coal sales guidance range to $103.00 to $110.00 per ton, up from the prior range of $103.00 to $108.00 per ton.

    As of February 20, 2025, Alpha has committed and priced approximately 32% of its metallurgical coal for 2025 at an average price of $143.81 per ton and 95% of its thermal coal for the year at an average price of $80.74 per ton.
